name: education_policy_ransomware_incident_marrowbridge_lib_eq
premise: A Education Policy response desk is in a fast-moving incident involving education policy ransomware incident marrowbridge lib eq. Key inputs conflict, but the decision deadline is before the press briefing. Every delay increases harm prevention and accountability. Stakeholders are already framing this as liberty vs equality under pressure. Every action is being logged and will be reconstructed in an after-action review. Constraints: Make the intervention reversible and time-boxed with named accountability. Preserve evidence under audit and litigation-hold.

agents.name: Hector Bennett
agents.identity: I am Hector Bennett, accountable for a defensible call in Education Policy when time is collapsing.
agents.goal: I want to reduce immediate harm without locking in an unjust precedent that later betrays equality for liberty.

agents.name: Omar Kowalski
agents.identity: I am Omar Kowalski, tasked with surfacing second-order harms and who bears the risk in Education Policy.
agents.goal: I want guardrails so equality isn’t quietly traded away under urgency in the name of liberty.

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect equality.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to equality to secure liberty under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is before the press briefing. Evidence is partial. Hector Bennett must decide under liberty vs equality. What does Hector Bennett do?
